import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { UserIcon, LockClosedIcon, EnvelopeIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; const Register = () => { const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ name: '', email: '', password: '', confirmPassword: '', userType: 'citizen' }); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const navigate = useNavigate(); const handleChange = (e) => { setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setLoading(true); // Simulate API call setTimeout(() => { setLoading(false); navigate('/dashboard'); }, 1000); }; return (
